title: Nexus StrategyPatchTransitionRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/strategies/{strategy_id}/transitions/patch (V1.71). Rewires an outer transition (linear next, conditional branch, or default target) and/or updates its condition label.

strategy_id.description: Preset / Strategy identifier from the URL path. Must match the path parameter.

base_revision.description: Revision observed by the client on the last canonical read.

source_state_id.description: State whose outgoing transition is being modified.

old_target.description: Current target state identifier of the transition to replace.

new_target.description: New target state identifier. Required when rewiring the transition.

condition.description: For conditional / labeled branches, identifies the branch to update. When present, the branch's condition is also updated to this value.

transition_kind.description: Optional disambiguator for the transition form being edited.
